current_life_events: Today is the day before the school science fair, and the student council has asked the user to help set up the booth and present their project. The user also has a new group of classmates in their history class who seem unfriendly. Additionally, the cafeteria has been quieter, but the user still hears whispers about their reading habits.
mental_state: The user feels a knot of nervous energy, worrying about being judged while also hoping to prove themselves.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The upcoming science fair presentation and the request to volunteer for a school event have reignited fears of social scrutiny, making the user reach out for support today.
